description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece without a bag.Product DetailsCreated from tough fabric Bow detail on the frontA zippered pocket on the front and backOne main zippered compartmentMaterials and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions: 17 cm x 16 cm
